content: Governed-memory record-writing + compaction tiers (issue #42 slice 6b) is template prose in one shared fragment templates/governed-memory.md, @include'd by BOTH LEARNINGS sections (prompt.md for afk; ghprompt-workflow.md for every *afk* provider mode) so the model reaches every mode through one fragment. Records under .otto/memory/<id>.json are the governed source; LEARNINGS.md stays the human projection (still what feeds the prompt <learnings> block via `cat`, so records remain inert on the READ path). Pinned at the render-contract level by governed-memory.test.ts (tiers, fields, otto-memory commands, both includes, afk+ghafk end-to-end). This .json is the first dogfooded record proving the documented shape parses.
